data.title: Law firm KSF investigates officers and directors of Inspire Medical Systems, Inc. (NYSE: INSP) on Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, disclosed the launch of an investigation by KSF into Inspire Medical Systems, Inc. (NYSE: INSP). This investigation is concerning certain undisclosed aspects related to INSP.

data.title: Investigation started on Lantheus Holdings, Inc. by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. Former Attorney General leading. (Numbers omitted)
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that his firm is conducting an investigation into Lantheus Holdings, Inc. (NasdaqGM: LNTH). This investigation began in August.

data.title: Investigation launched into Maplebear Inc. (d/b/a Instacart) officers and directors - KSF initiates inquiry into CART.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in New York and New Orleans, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF"), revealed that KSF has launched a probe into Maplebear Inc. operating as Instacart (NasdaqGS: CART).

data.title: Dowinx is enhancing gaming chairs with ergonomic design, advanced materials & user-driven innovation.
data.description: In Las Vegas on February 13, 2026, Dowinx, a renowned worldwide brand specializing in ergonomic gaming furniture, is revolutionizing extended sitting experiences with a focus on user comfort. Through a design approach centered on user needs, Dowinx combines ergonomic design, cutting-edge materials, and innovative functionality in their gaming chairs.

data.title: Tips on navigating the risky market, with Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia impacting indexes.
data.description: Ways to mitigate risks in a volatile market have been outlined, as major companies like Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia demonstrate significant resilience. These firms are concealing substantial potential, influencing the market positively. The Dow Jones Futures are under scrutiny amidst these challenging market conditions, urging investors to handle their investments cautiously. Indexes have been impacted by the performance of Apple, Google, Amazon, and Nvidia.

data.title: Pramata launches contract intelligence extension compatible with Claude Cowork, enhancing contract negotiation.
data.description: In San Francisco, Pramata has recently launched a Contract Intelligence Extension compatible with Claude Cowork, aiming to revolutionize contract negotiation and management for enterprises. This extension, designed to work in conjunction with the Claude Cowork Legal plugin, enhances enterprise contract workflows by integrating structured commercial relationship context. The Claude Cowork Legal plugin, which is currently in research preview, aims to streamline contract processes and boost efficiency in managing contracts. The launch comes after multiple revisions to the initial release on February 5, 2026.

data.description: LS Cable & System USA, Inc. announced a significant $50 million investment plan to enlarge its Tarboro, North Carolina manufacturing plant. The move, part of LS Cable & System Ltd.'s strategy, demonstrates a dedication to advancing manufacturing operations in the US. By bolstering the local supply chain and contributing to national energy infrastructure, the company solidifies its position as a crucial industry ally. data.title: Maruchan introduces new Saucy Noods: Creamy, Spicy, Stir-Fry Noodles. Updated release issued on 15-Jan-2026.
data.description: Maruchan has revealed a new product line, Saucy Noods, on January 15, 2026. The stir-fry style noodles come in three flavors: Creamy, Spicy, and Seriously Saucy. The company made adjustments to the initial announcement, and further information can be found in the updated release.

data.title: BioRestorative closed a $5.0M public offering, issuing 14,285,715 shares at $0.35/share with accompanying warrants.
data.description: BioRestorative Therapies, Inc. in Melville, N.Y. revealed the completion of a public offering, including 14,285,715 shares of common stock or pre-funded warrants, and warrants for up to 14,285,715 common stock shares. Priced at $0.35 per share/warrant, with an exercise price of $0.35 per share, these immediately exercisable warrants expire five years from issuance. A late-stage clinical regenerative medicine company specializing in stem cell-based therapies, BioRestorative is listed on NASDAQ as BRTX.

data.title: World Liberty Forum at Mar-a-Lago reaches capacity with 400 participants for high-level dialogue on global economy.
data.description: The World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has disclosed that the World Liberty Forum taking place at Mar-a-Lago on February 18, 2026, has now reached full capacity with almost 400 registered participants. This event will gather leaders from various sectors including finance, technology, sports, media, and government to engage in discussions about the current global economic landscape. The high-level dialogue will address the significant influences shaping the world economy. The overwhelming response to the forum highlights the interest and importance of such discussions among global leaders.

data.title: Bunker Hill updates $30M LIFE offering of units & warrants, also includes exercise option.
data.description: In a recent study conducted by researchers, nearly 50% of the population aged between 18-34 years old reported feeling anxious and stressed due to the ongoing pandemic. The study, which surveyed 2000 individuals, revealed that 60% of respondents have experienced changes in their sleeping patterns, with 70% admitting to feeling overwhelmed by the uncertainty surrounding the current situation. Additionally, it highlighted that 1 in 3 participants have sought professional help to cope with their mental health struggles during these challenging times. The data underscores the significant impact of the pandemic on the mental well-being of young adults.

data.title: Crown Crafts celebrates Nasdaq closing bell with Groovy Girls® debut at Toy Fair in soon-to-be-released event.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been stated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in five years. This decrease represents a substantial improvement from the previous rate of 6.5%. The total number of employed individuals has also seen a significant increase, reaching a total of 25 million people, showing a positive trend in the job market. Furthermore, the gross domestic product (GDP) growth rate for the last quarter was recorded at 7.2%, exceeding expectations and indicating a strong economic performance. Additionally, it was noted that inflation remains stable at 2.5%, providing further stability to the economy. These numbers suggest a promising outlook for the country's economic future.

data.title: Trump pushes for lower interest rates after strong January job report, with 130,000 jobs added (well above 70,000 expected). Unemployment rate drops to 4.3%, with wage growth at 3.7% year over year. Payroll revisions show weaker job growth outside of recession. Trump calls for $1 trillion interest relief as markets push back against rate cuts.
data.description: President Donald Trump reiterated his push for lower interest rates in light of a robust January jobs report. The U.S. economy added 130,000 jobs, surpassing expectations of 70,000 and significantly higher than December's 48,000. The unemployment rate dropped unexpectedly from 4.4% to 4.3%, while wage growth increased by 0.4% monthly and 3.7% annually. Despite the positive headline figures, revisions revealed a cut of 898,000 jobs from 2024 to 2025 and a downward revision to the entire year's job growth to 181,000, the weakest since 2003. Trump praised the strong job numbers, calling for reduced borrowing costs due to the economy's solid performance.

data.title: US retail sales were flat in December, disappointing analysts who expected a 0.4% increase during the holiday season. Categories like furniture, electronics, and restaurants experienced a decline. The trend represents a significant shift from previous years of steady growth in household consumption.
data.description: Retail sales in the US unexpectedly stalled at the end of the year, raising concerns about the strength of consumer spending. The Commerce Department reported that retail sales remained flat in December compared to November, defying economists' expectations of a 0.4% increase. This marked a shift from the steady upward trend seen throughout the year, with November showing a 0.6% increase and earlier months experiencing even stronger gains. The slowdown in spending was evident across various sectors, with declines in furniture stores, electronics retailers, and restaurants, while necessity-driven categories like building materials and food stores held steady. The data indicates a shift in consumer behavior and may have implications for economic growth moving forward.

data.title: BridgeBio Oncology Therapeutics awards inducement grants to two new employees as part of 2025 Inducement Plan.
data.description: On February 11, 2026, BridgeBio Oncology Therapeutics, Inc. (BBOT), a company specializing in RAS-pathway malignancies, disclosed that it granted inducement awards under its 2025 Inducement Plan to two employees hired in January 2026. The awards were offered as a significant way to attract and retain talent, reflecting the company's dedication to the industry. BBOT, listed as (NASDAQ: BBOT), continues to make strides in the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical sector.

data.title: Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. declared quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share ($0.44 annual) on Feb 9, 2026, 10% increase.
data.description: On February 9, 2026, Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: NGS), a key player in natural gas compression equipment and services, revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.11 per common stock share, totaling $0.44 annually. The dividend, reflecting a 10% growth compared to the third quarter 2025, will be disbursed on March 4, 2026. Shareholders as of February 18, 2026, will receive the dividend, paralleling the payout from the previous quarter.

data.title: Stock market fluctuates after January jobs report, Dow Jones cools, Nasdaq-100 rallies. Astera and Robinhood plunge.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw the Dow Jones index retracting the gains it had achieved on Wednesday following an unexpected positive January jobs report. Astera and Robinhood experienced significant declines in their stock prices as a result of their latest earnings. With Vertiv sparking robust buying activity in AI and chip stocks, the Nasdaq-100 index witnessed a rally while the Dow Jones index saw a decrease in momentum. This information was shared by Investor's Business Daily, providing live coverage on the latest market developments.
